revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{hatnote |This template is for the category namespace. For the article maintenance template, see [[:en:Template:Recategorize|Template:Recategorize]].}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> '''{{tlc|Category diffuse}}''' adds categories to [[:Category:Categories requiring diffusion]]. For more information on when to use this template, see [[WP:DIFFUSE]].
== Usage ==
Add this template to [[Wikipedia:Categorization#Non-article and maintenance categories|content]] categories that are frequently used in situations where a subcategory would be more appropriate. Do not use with {{tl|Container category}}. For more information, see {{cl|Container categories}}.
{{Other category-header templates}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{hatnote |This template is for the category namespace. For more information on when to use this template, see [[WP:DIFFUSE]].
== Usage ==
Add this template to [[Wikipedia:Categorization#Non-article and maintenance categories|content]] categories that are frequently used in situations where a subcategory would be more appropriate. Do not use with {{tl|Container category}}. For more information, see {{cl|Container categories}}.
{{Other category-header templates}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

For more information on when to use this template, see [[WP:DIFFUSE]].

Add this template to [[Wikipedia:Categorization#Non-article and maintenance categories|content]] categories that are frequently used in situations where a subcategory would be more appropriate. Do not use with {{tl|Container category}}. For more information, see {{cl|Container categories}}.

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_diffuse%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_diffuse%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{hatnote |This template is for the category namespace. For the article maintenance template, see [[:en:Template:Recategorize|Template:Recategorize]].}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> '''{{tlc|Category diffuse}}''' adds categories to [[:Category:Categories requiring diffusion]]. For more information on when to use this template, see [[WP:DIFFUSE]].
== Usage ==
Add this template to [[Wikipedia:Categorization#Non-article and maintenance categories|content]] categories that are frequently used in situations where a subcategory would be more appropriate. Do not use with {{tl|Container category}}. For more information, see {{cl|Container categories}}.
{{Other category-header templates}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
